        <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [
          <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>lat<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>long<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        ],
        <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"lat"</span>: {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          },
          <span class="pl-ent">"long"</span>: {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="in: query
name: coordinates
content:
  application/json:
    schema:
      type: object
      required:
        - lat
        - long
      properties:
        lat:
          type: number
        long:
          type: number"><pre><span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">query</span>
<span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">coordinates</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
        - <span class="pl-s">lat</span>
        - <span class="pl-s">long</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">lat</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">number</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">long</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">number</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Request Body Object</h4><a id="user-content-request-body-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Request Body Object" href="#request-body-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Describes a single request body.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-11" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-11"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-requestbodydescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>A brief description of the request body. This could contain examples of use.  <a href="http://spec.commonmark.org/" rel="nofollow">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-requestbodycontent"></a>content</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#media-type-object">Media Type Object</a>]</td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The content of the request body. The key is a media type or <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#appendix-D" rel="nofollow">media type range</a> and the value describes it.  For requests that match multiple keys, only the most specific key is applicable. e.g. text/plain overrides text/*</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-requestbodyrequired"></a>required</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Determines if the request body is required in the request. Defaults to <code>false</code>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Request Body Examples</h5><a id="user-content-request-body-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Request Body Examples" href="#request-body-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A request body with a referenced model definition.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;user to add to the system&quot;,
  &quot;content&quot;: {
    &quot;application/json&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/User&quot;
      },
      &quot;examples&quot;: {
          &quot;user&quot; : {
            &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;User Example&quot;,
            &quot;externalValue&quot;: &quot;http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.json&quot;
          }
        }
    },
    &quot;application/xml&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/User&quot;
      },
      &quot;examples&quot;: {
          &quot;user&quot; : {
            &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;User example in XML&quot;,
            &quot;externalValue&quot;: &quot;http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.xml&quot;
          }
        }
    },
    &quot;text/plain&quot;: {
      &quot;examples&quot;: {
        &quot;user&quot; : {
            &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;User example in Plain text&quot;,
            &quot;externalValue&quot;: &quot;http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.txt&quot;
        }
      }
    },
    &quot;*/*&quot;: {
      &quot;examples&quot;: {
        &quot;user&quot; : {
            &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;User example in other format&quot;,
            &quot;externalValue&quot;: &quot;http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.whatever&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>user to add to the system<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"application/json"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/User<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"examples"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"user"</span> : {
            <span class="pl-ent">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>User Example<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"externalValue"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          }
        }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"application/xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/User<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"examples"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"user"</span> : {
            <span class="pl-ent">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>User example in XML<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"externalValue"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.xml<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          }
        }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"text/plain"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"examples"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"user"</span> : {
            <span class="pl-ent">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>User example in Plain text<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"externalValue"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.txt<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"*/*"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"examples"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"user"</span> : {
            <span class="pl-ent">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>User example in other format<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"externalValue"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.whatever<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: user to add to the system
content:
  'application/json':
    schema:
      $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    examples:
      user:
        summary: User Example
        externalValue: 'http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.json'
  'application/xml':
    schema:
      $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    examples:
      user:
        summary: User Example in XML
        externalValue: 'http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.xml'
  'text/plain':
    examples:
      user:
        summary: User example in text plain format
        externalValue: 'http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.txt'
  '*/*':
    examples:
      user:
        summary: User example in other format
        externalValue: 'http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.whatever'"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">user to add to the system</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">application/json</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/User<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
    <span class="pl-ent">examples</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">user</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">User Example</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">externalValue</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.json<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">application/xml</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/User<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
    <span class="pl-ent">examples</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">user</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">User Example in XML</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">externalValue</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.xml<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">text/plain</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">examples</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">user</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">User example in text plain format</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">externalValue</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.txt<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">*/*</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">examples</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">user</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">User example in other format</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">externalValue</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>http://foo.bar/examples/user-example.whatever<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">A body parameter that is an array of string values:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;user to add to the system&quot;,
  &quot;content&quot;: {
    &quot;text/plain&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
        &quot;items&quot;: {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>user to add to the system<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"text/plain"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: user to add to the system
required: true
content:
  text/plain:
    schema:
      type: array
      items:
        type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">user to add to the system</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">text/plain</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Media Type Object</h4><a id="user-content-media-type-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Media Type Object" href="#media-type-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-12" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-12"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-mediatypeschema"></a>schema</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a></td>
<td>The schema defining the type used for the request body.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-mediatypeexample"></a>example</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Example of the media type.  The example object SHOULD be in the correct format as specified by the media type.  The <code>example</code> field is mutually exclusive of the <code>examples</code> field.  Furthermore, if referencing a <code>schema</code> which contains an example, the <code>example</code> value SHALL <em>override</em> the example provided by the schema.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-mediatypeexamples"></a>examples</td>
<td align="center">Map[ <code>string</code>, <a href="#example-object">Example Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a>]</td>
<td>Examples of the media type.  Each example object SHOULD  match the media type and specified schema if present.  The <code>examples</code> field is mutually exclusive of the <code>example</code> field.  Furthermore, if referencing a <code>schema</code> which contains an example, the <code>examples</code> value SHALL <em>override</em> the example provided by the schema.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-mediatypeencoding"></a>encoding</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#encoding-object">Encoding Object</a>]</td>
<td>A map between a property name and its encoding information. The key, being the property name, MUST exist in the schema as a property. The encoding object SHALL only apply to <code>requestBody</code> objects when the media type is <code>multipart</code> or <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Media Type Examples</h5><a id="user-content-media-type-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Media Type Examples" href="#media-type-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;application/json&quot;: {
    &quot;schema&quot;: {
         &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;
    },
    &quot;examples&quot;: {
      &quot;cat&quot; : {
        &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;An example of a cat&quot;,
        &quot;value&quot;:
          {
            &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Fluffy&quot;,
            &quot;petType&quot;: &quot;Cat&quot;,
            &quot;color&quot;: &quot;White&quot;,
            &quot;gender&quot;: &quot;male&quot;,
            &quot;breed&quot;: &quot;Persian&quot;
          }
      },
      &quot;dog&quot;: {
        &quot;summary&quot;: &quot;An example of a dog with a cat's name&quot;,
        &quot;value&quot; :  {
          &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Puma&quot;,
          &quot;petType&quot;: &quot;Dog&quot;,
          &quot;color&quot;: &quot;Black&quot;,
          &quot;gender&quot;: &quot;Female&quot;,
          &quot;breed&quot;: &quot;Mixed&quot;
        },
      &quot;frog&quot;: {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/examples/frog-example&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"application/json"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
         <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/components/schemas/Pet"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"examples"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"cat"</span> : <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"An example of a cat"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"value"</span>:
          <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Fluffy"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"petType"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Cat"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"color"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"White"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"gender"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"male"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"breed"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Persian"</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"dog"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"summary"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"An example of a dog with a cat's name"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"value"</span> :  <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Puma"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"petType"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Dog"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"color"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Black"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"gender"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Female"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"breed"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Mixed"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"frog"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/components/examples/frog-example"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="application/json:
  schema:
    $ref: &quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;
  examples:
    cat:
      summary: An example of a cat
      value:
        name: Fluffy
        petType: Cat
        color: White
        gender: male
        breed: Persian
    dog:
      summary: An example of a dog with a cat's name
      value:
        name: Puma
        petType: Dog
        color: Black
        gender: Female
        breed: Mixed
    frog:
      $ref: &quot;#/components/examples/frog-example&quot;"><pre><span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
  <span class="pl-ent">examples</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">cat</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">An example of a cat</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">value</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">Fluffy</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">petType</span>: <span class="pl-s">Cat</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">color</span>: <span class="pl-s">White</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">gender</span>: <span class="pl-s">male</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">breed</span>: <span class="pl-s">Persian</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">dog</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">summary</span>: <span class="pl-s">An example of a dog with a cat's name</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">value</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">Puma</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">petType</span>: <span class="pl-s">Dog</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">color</span>: <span class="pl-s">Black</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">gender</span>: <span class="pl-s">Female</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">breed</span>: <span class="pl-s">Mixed</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">frog</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/examples/frog-example<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Considerations for File Uploads</h5><a id="user-content-considerations-for-file-uploads" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Considerations for File Uploads" href="#considerations-for-file-uploads"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">In contrast with the 2.0 specification, <code>file</code> input/output content in OpenAPI is described with the same semantics as any other schema type. Specifically:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# content transferred with base64 encoding
schema:
  type: string
  format: base64"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> content transferred with base64 encoding</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">base64</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# content transferred in binary (octet-stream):
schema:
  type: string
  format: binary"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> content transferred in binary (octet-stream):</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">These examples apply to either input payloads of file uploads or response payloads.</p>
<p dir="auto">A <code>requestBody</code> for submitting a file in a <code>POST</code> operation may look like the following example:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="requestBody:
  content:
    application/octet-stream:
      # any media type is accepted, functionally equivalent to `*/*`
      schema:
        # a binary file of any type
        type: string
        format: binary"><pre><span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">application/octet-stream</span>:
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> any media type is accepted, functionally equivalent to `*/*`</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> a binary file of any type</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">In addition, specific media types MAY be specified:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# multiple, specific media types may be specified:
requestBody:
  content:
      # a binary file of type png or jpeg
    'image/jpeg':
      schema:
        type: string
        format: binary
    'image/png':
      schema:
        type: string
        format: binary       "><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> multiple, specific media types may be specified:</span>
<span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> a binary file of type png or jpeg</span>
    <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">image/jpeg</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span>
    <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">image/png</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary       </span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">To upload multiple files, a <code>multipart</code> media type MUST be used:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="requestBody:
  content:
    multipart/form-data:
      schema:
        properties:
          # The property name 'file' will be used for all files.
          file:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
              format: binary
"><pre><span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">multipart/form-data</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> The property name 'file' will be used for all files.</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">file</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
              <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
              <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span>
</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Support for x-www-form-urlencoded Request Bodies</h5><a id="user-content-support-for-x-www-form-urlencoded-request-bodies" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Support for x-www-form-urlencoded Request Bodies" href="#support-for-x-www-form-urlencoded-request-bodies"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">To submit content using form url encoding via <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc1866" rel="nofollow">RFC1866</a>, the following
definition may be used:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="requestBody:
  content:
    application/x-www-form-urlencoded:
      schema:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            format: uuid
          address:
            # complex types are stringified to support RFC 1866
            type: object
            properties: {}"><pre><span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">application/x-www-form-urlencoded</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">id</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">uuid</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">address</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> complex types are stringified to support RFC 1866</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>: <span class="pl-s">{}</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">In this example, the contents in the <code>requestBody</code> MUST be stringified per <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc1866/" rel="nofollow">RFC1866</a> when passed to the server.  In addition, the <code>address</code> field complex object will be stringified.</p>
<p dir="auto">When passing complex objects in the <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code> content type, the default serialization strategy of such properties is described in the <a href="#encoding-object"><code>Encoding Object</code></a>'s <a href="#encodingStyle"><code>style</code></a> property as <code>form</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Special Considerations for <code>multipart</code> Content</h5><a id="user-content-special-considerations-for-multipart-content" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Special Considerations for multipart Content" href="#special-considerations-for-multipart-content"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">It is common to use <code>multipart/form-data</code> as a <code>Content-Type</code> when transferring request bodies to operations.  In contrast to 2.0, a <code>schema</code> is REQUIRED to define the input parameters to the operation when using <code>multipart</code> content.  This supports complex structures as well as supporting mechanisms for multiple file uploads.</p>
<p dir="auto">When passing in <code>multipart</code> types, boundaries MAY be used to separate sections of the content being transferred — thus, the following default <code>Content-Type</code>s are defined for <code>multipart</code>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>If the property is a primitive, or an array of primitive values, the default Content-Type is <code>text/plain</code></li>
<li>If the property is complex, or an array of complex values, the default Content-Type is <code>application/json</code></li>
<li>If the property is a <code>type: string</code> with <code>format: binary</code> or <code>format: base64</code> (aka a file object), the default Content-Type is <code>application/octet-stream</code></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Examples:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="requestBody:
  content:
    multipart/form-data:
      schema:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            format: uuid
          address:
            # default Content-Type for objects is `application/json`
            type: object
            properties: {}
          profileImage:
            # default Content-Type for string/binary is `application/octet-stream`
            type: string
            format: binary
          children:
            # default Content-Type for arrays is based on the `inner` type (text/plain here)
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
          addresses:
            # default Content-Type for arrays is based on the `inner` type (object shown, so `application/json` in this example)
            type: array
            items:
              type: '#/components/schemas/Address'"><pre><span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">multipart/form-data</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">id</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">uuid</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">address</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default Content-Type for objects is `application/json`</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>: <span class="pl-s">{}</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">profileImage</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default Content-Type for string/binary is `application/octet-stream`</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">children</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default Content-Type for arrays is based on the `inner` type (text/plain here)</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
              <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">addresses</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default Content-Type for arrays is based on the `inner` type (object shown, so `application/json` in this example)</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
              <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/Address<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">An <code>encoding</code> attribute is introduced to give you control over the serialization of parts of <code>multipart</code> request bodies.  This attribute is <em>only</em> applicable to <code>multipart</code> and <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code> request bodies.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Encoding Object</h4><a id="user-content-encoding-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Encoding Object" href="#encoding-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-13" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-13"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-encodingcontenttype"></a>contentType</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The Content-Type for encoding a specific property. Default value depends on the property type: for <code>string</code> with <code>format</code> being <code>binary</code> – <code>application/octet-stream</code>; for other primitive types – <code>text/plain</code>; for <code>object</code> - <code>application/json</code>; for <code>array</code> – the default is defined based on the inner type. The value can be a specific media type (e.g. <code>application/json</code>), a wildcard media type (e.g. <code>image/*</code>), or a comma-separated list of the two types.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-encodingheaders"></a>headers</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#header-object">Header Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a>]</td>
<td>A map allowing additional information to be provided as headers, for example <code>Content-Disposition</code>.  <code>Content-Type</code> is described separately and SHALL be ignored in this section. This property SHALL be ignored if the request body media type is not a <code>multipart</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-encodingstyle"></a>style</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Describes how a specific property value will be serialized depending on its type.  See <a href="#parameter-object">Parameter Object</a> for details on the <a href="#parameterStyle"><code>style</code></a> property. The behavior follows the same values as <code>query</code> parameters, including default values. This property SHALL be ignored if the request body media type is not <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-encodingexplode"></a>explode</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>When this is true, property values of type <code>array</code> or <code>object</code> generate separate parameters for each value of the array, or key-value-pair of the map.  For other types of properties this property has no effect. When <a href="#encodingStyle"><code>style</code></a> is <code>form</code>, the default value is <code>true</code>. For all other styles, the default value is <code>false</code>. This property SHALL be ignored if the request body media type is not <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-encodingallowreserved"></a>allowReserved</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Determines whether the parameter value SHOULD allow reserved characters, as defined by <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986#section-2.2" rel="nofollow">RFC3986</a> <code>:/?#[]@!$&amp;'()*+,;=</code> to be included without percent-encoding. The default value is <code>false</code>. This property SHALL be ignored if the request body media type is not <code>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</code>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Encoding Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-encoding-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Encoding Object Example" href="#encoding-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="requestBody:
  content:
    multipart/mixed:
      schema:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            # default is text/plain
            type: string
            format: uuid
          address:
            # default is application/json
            type: object
            properties: {}
          historyMetadata:
            # need to declare XML format!
            description: metadata in XML format
            type: object
            properties: {}
          profileImage:
            # default is application/octet-stream, need to declare an image type only!
            type: string
            format: binary
      encoding:
        historyMetadata:
          # require XML Content-Type in utf-8 encoding
          contentType: application/xml; charset=utf-8
        profileImage:
          # only accept png/jpeg
          contentType: image/png, image/jpeg
          headers:
            X-Rate-Limit-Limit:
              description: The number of allowed requests in the current period
              schema:
                type: integer"><pre><span class="pl-ent">requestBody</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">multipart/mixed</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">id</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default is text/plain</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">uuid</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">address</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default is application/json</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>: <span class="pl-s">{}</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">historyMetadata</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> need to declare XML format!</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">metadata in XML format</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>: <span class="pl-s">{}</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">profileImage</span>:
            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> default is application/octet-stream, need to declare an image type only!</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">binary</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">encoding</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">historyMetadata</span>:
          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> require XML Content-Type in utf-8 encoding</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">contentType</span>: <span class="pl-s">application/xml; charset=utf-8</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">profileImage</span>:
          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> only accept png/jpeg</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">contentType</span>: <span class="pl-s">image/png, image/jpeg</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">headers</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Limit</span>:
              <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of allowed requests in the current period</span>
              <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
                <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Responses Object</h4><a id="user-content-responses-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Responses Object" href="#responses-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A container for the expected responses of an operation.
The container maps a HTTP response code to the expected response.</p>
<p dir="auto">The documentation is not necessarily expected to cover all possible HTTP response codes because they may not be known in advance.
However, documentation is expected to cover a successful operation response and any known errors.</p>
<p dir="auto">The <code>default</code> MAY be used as a default response object for all HTTP codes
that are not covered individually by the specification.</p>
<p dir="auto">The <code>Responses Object</code> MUST contain at least one response code, and it
SHOULD be the response for a successful operation call.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-14" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-14"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsesdefault"></a>default</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#response-object">Response Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a></td>
<td>The documentation of responses other than the ones declared for specific HTTP response codes. Use this field to cover undeclared responses. A <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a> can link to a response that the <a href="#componentsResponses">OpenAPI Object's components/responses</a> section defines.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-1"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsescode"></a><a href="#http-status-codes">HTTP Status Code</a></td>
<td align="center"><a href="#response-object">Response Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a></td>
<td>Any <a href="#http-status-codes">HTTP status code</a> can be used as the property name, but only one property per code, to describe the expected response for that HTTP status code.  A <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a> can link to a response that is defined in the <a href="#componentsResponses">OpenAPI Object's components/responses</a> section. This field MUST be enclosed in quotation marks (for example, "200") for compatibility between JSON and YAML. To define a range of response codes, this field MAY contain the uppercase wildcard character <code>X</code>. For example, <code>2XX</code> represents all response codes between <code>[200-299]</code>. The following range definitions are allowed: <code>1XX</code>, <code>2XX</code>, <code>3XX</code>, <code>4XX</code>, and <code>5XX</code>. If a response range is defined using an explicit code, the explicit code definition takes precedence over the range definition for that code.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Responses Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-responses-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Responses Object Example" href="#responses-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A 200 response for a successful operation and a default response for others (implying an error):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;200&quot;: {
    &quot;description&quot;: &quot;a pet to be returned&quot;,
    &quot;content&quot;: {
      &quot;application/json&quot;: {
        &quot;schema&quot;: {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  },
  &quot;default&quot;: {
    &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Unexpected error&quot;,
    &quot;content&quot;: {
      &quot;application/json&quot;: {
        &quot;schema&quot;: {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/ErrorModel&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"200"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>a pet to be returned<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"application/json"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Unexpected error<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"application/json"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/ErrorModel<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="'200':
  description: a pet to be returned
  content:
    application/json:
      schema:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
default:
  description: Unexpected error
  content:
    application/json:
      schema:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorModel'"><pre><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">200</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">a pet to be returned</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
<span class="pl-ent">default</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">Unexpected error</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/ErrorModel<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Response Object</h4><a id="user-content-response-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Response Object" href="#response-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Describes a single response from an API Operation, including design-time, static
<code>links</code> to operations based on the response.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-15" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-15"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsedescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. A short description of the response. <a href="http://spec.commonmark.org/" rel="nofollow">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responseheaders"></a>headers</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#header-object">Header Object</a>  | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a>]</td>
<td>Maps a header name to its definition. <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7230#page-22" rel="nofollow">RFC7230</a> states header names are case insensitive. If a response header is defined with the name <code>"Content-Type"</code>, it SHALL be ignored.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsecontent"></a>content</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#media-type-object">Media Type Object</a>]</td>
<td>A map containing descriptions of potential response payloads. The key is a media type or <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#appendix-D" rel="nofollow">media type range</a> and the value describes it.  For responses that match multiple keys, only the most specific key is applicable. e.g. text/plain overrides text/*</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responselinks"></a>links</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <a href="#link-object">Link Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a>]</td>
<td>A map of operations links that can be followed from the response. The key of the map is a short name for the link, following the naming constraints of the names for <a href="#components-object">Component Objects</a>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Response Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-response-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Response Object Examples" href="#response-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Response of an array of a complex type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A complex object array response&quot;,
  &quot;content&quot;: {
    &quot;application/json&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
        &quot;items&quot;: {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/VeryComplexType&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A complex object array response<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"application/json"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/VeryComplexType<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A complex object array response
content:
  application/json:
    schema:
      type: array
      items:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/VeryComplexType'"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A complex object array response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/VeryComplexType<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response with a string type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A simple string response&quot;,
  &quot;content&quot;: {
    &quot;text/plain&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
      }
    }
  }

}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A simple string response<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"text/plain"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }

}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A simple string response
content:
  text/plain:
    schema:
      type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A simple string response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">text/plain</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Plain text response with headers:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A simple string response&quot;,
  &quot;content&quot;: {
    &quot;text/plain&quot;: {
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
      }
    }
  },
  &quot;headers&quot;: {
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Limit&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of allowed requests in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Remaining&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of remaining requests in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Reset&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of seconds left in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;schema&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A simple string response<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"text/plain"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"headers"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"X-Rate-Limit-Limit"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The number of allowed requests in the current period<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"X-Rate-Limit-Remaining"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The number of remaining requests in the current period<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"X-Rate-Limit-Reset"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The number of seconds left in the current period<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"schema"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A simple string response
content:
  text/plain:
    schema:
      type: string
    example: 'whoa!'
headers:
  X-Rate-Limit-Limit:
    description: The number of allowed requests in the current period
    schema:
      type: integer
  X-Rate-Limit-Remaining:
    description: The number of remaining requests in the current period
    schema:
      type: integer
  X-Rate-Limit-Reset:
    description: The number of seconds left in the current period
    schema:
      type: integer"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A simple string response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">content</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">text/plain</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">example</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>whoa!<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
<span class="pl-ent">headers</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Limit</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of allowed requests in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Remaining</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of remaining requests in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Reset</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of seconds left in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response with no return value:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;object created&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object created<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: object created"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">object created</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Callback Object</h4><a id="user-content-callback-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Callback Object" href="#callback-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A map of possible out-of band callbacks related to the parent operation.
Each value in the map is a <a href="#path-item-object">Path Item Object</a> that describes a set of requests that may be initiated by the API provider and the expected responses.
The key value used to identify the callback object is an expression, evaluated at runtime, that identifies a URL to use for the callback operation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-2" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-2"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-callbackexpression"></a>{expression}</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#path-item-object">Path Item Object</a></td>
<td>A Path Item Object used to define a callback request and expected responses.  A <a href="/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification/blob/main/examples/v3.0/callback-example.yaml">complete example</a> is available.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Key Expression</h5><a id="user-content-key-expression" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Key Expression" href="#key-expression"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The key that identifies the <a href="#path-item-object">Path Item Object</a> is a <a href="#runtime-expressions">runtime expression</a> that can be evaluated in the context of a runtime HTTP request/response to identify the URL to be used for the callback request.
A simple example might be <code>$request.body#/url</code>.
However, using a <a href="#runtime-expressions">runtime expression</a> the complete HTTP message can be accessed.
This includes accessing any part of a body that a JSON Pointer <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6901" rel="nofollow">RFC6901</a> can reference.</p>
<p dir="auto">For example, given the following HTTP request:</p>
