            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Models with Polymorphism Support</h6><a id="user-content-models-with-polymorphism-support" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Models with Polymorphism Support" href="#models-with-polymorphism-support"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;components&quot;: {
    &quot;schemas&quot;: {
      &quot;Pet&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
        &quot;discriminator&quot;: {
          &quot;propertyName&quot;: &quot;petType&quot;
        },
        &quot;properties&quot;: {
          &quot;name&quot;: {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
          },
          &quot;petType&quot;: {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
          }
        },
        &quot;required&quot;: [
          &quot;name&quot;,
          &quot;petType&quot;
        ]
      },
      &quot;Cat&quot;: {
        &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A representation of a cat. Note that `Cat` will be used as the discriminator value.&quot;,
        &quot;allOf&quot;: [
          {
            &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;
          },
          {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
            &quot;properties&quot;: {
              &quot;huntingSkill&quot;: {
                &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
                &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The measured skill for hunting&quot;,
                &quot;default&quot;: &quot;lazy&quot;,
                &quot;enum&quot;: [
                  &quot;clueless&quot;,
                  &quot;lazy&quot;,
                  &quot;adventurous&quot;,
                  &quot;aggressive&quot;
                ]
              }
            },
            &quot;required&quot;: [
              &quot;huntingSkill&quot;
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      &quot;Dog&quot;: {
        &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A representation of a dog. Note that `Dog` will be used as the discriminator value.&quot;,
        &quot;allOf&quot;: [
          {
            &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;
          },
          {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
            &quot;properties&quot;: {
              &quot;packSize&quot;: {
                &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
                &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int32&quot;,
                &quot;description&quot;: &quot;the size of the pack the dog is from&quot;,
                &quot;default&quot;: 0,
                &quot;minimum&quot;: 0
              }
            },
            &quot;required&quot;: [
              &quot;packSize&quot;
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"components"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"schemas"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"Pet"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"discriminator"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"propertyName"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>petType<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          },
          <span class="pl-ent">"petType"</span>: {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          }
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [
          <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>petType<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        ]
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"Cat"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A representation of a cat. Note that `Cat` will be used as the discriminator value.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"allOf"</span>: [
          {
            <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          },
          {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
              <span class="pl-ent">"huntingSkill"</span>: {
                <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The measured skill for hunting<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>lazy<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [
                  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>clueless<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>lazy<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>adventurous<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                  <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>aggressive<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
                ]
              }
            },
            <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [
              <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>huntingSkill<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"Dog"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A representation of a dog. Note that `Dog` will be used as the discriminator value.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"allOf"</span>: [
          {
            <span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
          },
          {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
            <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
              <span class="pl-ent">"packSize"</span>: {
                <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>int32<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>the size of the pack the dog is from<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>,
                <span class="pl-ent">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
              }
            },
            <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [
              <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>packSize<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      discriminator:
        propertyName: petType
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        petType:
          type: string
      required:
      - name
      - petType
    Cat:  ## &quot;Cat&quot; will be used as the discriminator value
      description: A representation of a cat
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        properties:
          huntingSkill:
            type: string
            description: The measured skill for hunting
            enum:
            - clueless
            - lazy
            - adventurous
            - aggressive
        required:
        - huntingSkill
    Dog:  ## &quot;Dog&quot; will be used as the discriminator value
      description: A representation of a dog
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        properties:
          packSize:
            type: integer
            format: int32
            description: the size of the pack the dog is from
            default: 0
            minimum: 0
        required:
        - packSize"><pre><span class="pl-ent">components</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">schemas</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">Pet</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">discriminator</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">propertyName</span>: <span class="pl-s">petType</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">name</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">petType</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
      - <span class="pl-s">name</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">petType</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">Cat</span>:  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span># "Cat" will be used as the discriminator value</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A representation of a cat</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">allOf</span>:
      - <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
      - <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">huntingSkill</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The measured skill for hunting</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">enum</span>:
            - <span class="pl-s">clueless</span>
            - <span class="pl-s">lazy</span>
            - <span class="pl-s">adventurous</span>
            - <span class="pl-s">aggressive</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
        - <span class="pl-s">huntingSkill</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">Dog</span>:  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span># "Dog" will be used as the discriminator value</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A representation of a dog</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">allOf</span>:
      - <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/components/schemas/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
      - <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">packSize</span>:
            <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int32</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">the size of the pack the dog is from</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">default</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
            <span class="pl-ent">minimum</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
        - <span class="pl-s">packSize</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Discriminator Object</h4><a id="user-content-discriminator-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Discriminator Object" href="#discriminator-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a <code>discriminator</code> object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.  The discriminator is a specific object in a schema which is used to inform the consumer of the specification of an alternative schema based on the value associated with it.</p>
<p dir="auto">When using the discriminator, <em>inline</em> schemas will not be considered.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-21" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-21"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-propertyname"></a>propertyName</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-discriminatormapping"></a> mapping</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <code>string</code>]</td>
<td>An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">The discriminator attribute is legal only when using one of the composite keywords <code>oneOf</code>, <code>anyOf</code>, <code>allOf</code>.</p>
<p dir="auto">In OAS 3.0, a response payload MAY be described to be exactly one of any number of types:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'"><pre>MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">which means the payload <em>MUST</em>, by validation, match exactly one of the schemas described by <code>Cat</code>, <code>Dog</code>, or <code>Lizard</code>.  In this case, a discriminator MAY act as a "hint" to shortcut validation and selection of the matching schema which may be a costly operation, depending on the complexity of the schema. We can then describe exactly which field tells us which schema to use:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'
  discriminator:
    propertyName: pet_type"><pre>MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'
  discriminator:
    propertyName: pet_type</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">The expectation now is that a property with name <code>pet_type</code> <em>MUST</em> be present in the response payload, and the value will correspond to the name of a schema defined in the OAS document.  Thus the response payload:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;id&quot;: 12345,
  &quot;pet_type&quot;: &quot;Cat&quot;
}"><pre>{
  "id": 12345,
  "pet_type": "Cat"
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Will indicate that the <code>Cat</code> schema be used in conjunction with this payload.</p>
<p dir="auto">In scenarios where the value of the discriminator field does not match the schema name or implicit mapping is not possible, an optional <code>mapping</code> definition MAY be used:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'
  - $ref: 'https://gigantic-server.com/schemas/Monster/schema.json'
  discriminator:
    propertyName: pet_type
    mapping:
      dog: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
      monster: 'https://gigantic-server.com/schemas/Monster/schema.json'"><pre>MyResponseType:
  oneOf:
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cat'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Lizard'
  - $ref: 'https://gigantic-server.com/schemas/Monster/schema.json'
  discriminator:
    propertyName: pet_type
    mapping:
      dog: '#/components/schemas/Dog'
      monster: 'https://gigantic-server.com/schemas/Monster/schema.json'</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Here the discriminator <em>value</em> of <code>dog</code> will map to the schema <code>#/components/schemas/Dog</code>, rather than the default (implicit) value of <code>Dog</code>.  If the discriminator <em>value</em> does not match an implicit or explicit mapping, no schema can be determined and validation SHOULD fail. Mapping keys MUST be string values, but tooling MAY convert response values to strings for comparison.</p>
<p dir="auto">When used in conjunction with the <code>anyOf</code> construct, the use of the discriminator can avoid ambiguity where multiple schemas may satisfy a single payload.</p>
<p dir="auto">In both the <code>oneOf</code> and <code>anyOf</code> use cases, all possible schemas MUST be listed explicitly.  To avoid redundancy, the discriminator MAY be added to a parent schema definition, and all schemas comprising the parent schema in an <code>allOf</code> construct may be used as an alternate schema.</p>
<p dir="auto">For example:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      required:
      - pet_type
      properties:
        pet_type:
          type: string
      discriminator:
        propertyName: pet_type
        mapping:
          cachorro: Dog
    Cat:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Cat`
        properties:
          name:
            type: string
    Dog:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Dog`
        properties:
          bark:
            type: string
    Lizard:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Lizard`
        properties:
          lovesRocks:
            type: boolean"><pre>components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      required:
      - pet_type
      properties:
        pet_type:
          type: string
      discriminator:
        propertyName: pet_type
        mapping:
          cachorro: Dog
    Cat:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Cat`
        properties:
          name:
            type: string
    Dog:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Dog`
        properties:
          bark:
            type: string
    Lizard:
      allOf:
      - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
      - type: object
        # all other properties specific to a `Lizard`
        properties:
          lovesRocks:
            type: boolean</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">a payload like this:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;pet_type&quot;: &quot;Cat&quot;,
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;misty&quot;
}"><pre>{
  "pet_type": "Cat",
  "name": "misty"
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">will indicate that the <code>Cat</code> schema be used.  Likewise this schema:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-roff notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;pet_type&quot;: &quot;cachorro&quot;,
  &quot;bark&quot;: &quot;soft&quot;
}"><pre>{
  "pet_type": "cachorro",
  "bark": "soft"
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">will map to <code>Dog</code> because of the definition in the <code>mappings</code> element.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Object</h4><a id="user-content-xml-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Object" href="#xml-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.</p>
<p dir="auto">When using arrays, XML element names are <em>not</em> inferred (for singular/plural forms) and the <code>name</code> property SHOULD be used to add that information.
See examples for expected behavior.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-22" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-22"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlname"></a>name</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property. When defined within <code>items</code>, it will affect the name of the individual XML elements within the list. When defined alongside <code>type</code> being <code>array</code> (outside the <code>items</code>), it will affect the wrapping element and only if <code>wrapped</code> is <code>true</code>. If <code>wrapped</code> is <code>false</code>, it will be ignored.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlnamespace"></a>namespace</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The URI of the namespace definition. Value MUST be in the form of an absolute URI.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlprefix"></a>prefix</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The prefix to be used for the <a href="#xmlName">name</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlattribute"></a>attribute</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element. Default value is <code>false</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlwrapped"></a>wrapped</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>MAY be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped (for example, <code>&lt;books&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;/books&gt;</code>) or unwrapped (<code>&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;</code>). Default value is <code>false</code>. The definition takes effect only when defined alongside <code>type</code> being <code>array</code> (outside the <code>items</code>).</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-xml-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Object Examples" href="#xml-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The examples of the XML object definitions are included inside a property definition of a <a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a> with a sample of the XML representation of it.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">No XML Element</h6><a id="user-content-no-xml-element" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: No XML Element" href="#no-xml-element"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Basic string property:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;animals&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    }
}"><pre>{
    <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Basic string array property (<a href="#xmlWrapped"><code>wrapped</code></a> is <code>false</code> by default):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;animals&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
        &quot;items&quot;: {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        }
    }
}"><pre>{
    <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
            <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
    }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Name Replacement</h6><a id="user-content-xml-name-replacement" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Name Replacement" href="#xml-name-replacement"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>animal<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: string
  xml:
    name: animal"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;...&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Attribute, Prefix and Namespace</h6><a id="user-content-xml-attribute-prefix-and-namespace" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Attribute, Prefix and Namespace" href="#xml-attribute-prefix-and-namespace"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">In this example, a full model definition is shown.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;Person&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
    &quot;properties&quot;: {
      &quot;id&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
        &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int32&quot;,
        &quot;xml&quot;: {
          &quot;attribute&quot;: true
        }
      },
      &quot;name&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
        &quot;xml&quot;: {
          &quot;namespace&quot;: &quot;http://example.com/schema/sample&quot;,
          &quot;prefix&quot;: &quot;sample&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"Person"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"id"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>int32<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"attribute"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
        }
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"namespace"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://example.com/schema/sample<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"prefix"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>sample<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Person:
  type: object
  properties:
    id:
      type: integer
      format: int32
      xml:
        attribute: true
    name:
      type: string
      xml:
        namespace: http://example.com/schema/sample
        prefix: sample"><pre><span class="pl-ent">Person</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">id</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int32</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">attribute</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">namespace</span>: <span class="pl-s">http://example.com/schema/sample</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">prefix</span>: <span class="pl-s">sample</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;Person id=&quot;123&quot;&gt;
    &lt;sample:name xmlns:sample=&quot;http://example.com/schema/sample&quot;&gt;example&lt;/sample:name&gt;
&lt;/Person&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">Person</span> <span class="pl-e">id</span>=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>123<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>&gt;
    &lt;<span class="pl-ent">sample</span><span class="pl-ent">:</span><span class="pl-ent">name</span> <span class="pl-e">xmlns</span><span class="pl-e">:</span><span class="pl-e">sample</span>=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://example.com/schema/sample<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>&gt;example&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">sample</span><span class="pl-ent">:</span><span class="pl-ent">name</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">Person</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Arrays</h6><a id="user-content-xml-arrays" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Arrays" href="#xml-arrays"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Changing the element names:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>animal<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">The external <code>name</code> property has no effect on the XML:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>animal<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>aliens<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    name: aliens"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Even when the array is wrapped, if a name is not explicitly defined, the same name will be used both internally and externally:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
  xml:
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;
  &lt;animals&gt;value&lt;/animals&gt;
  &lt;animals&gt;value&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">To overcome the naming problem in the example above, the following definition can be used:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>animal<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Affecting both internal and external names:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;,
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>animal<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>aliens<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    name: aliens
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;aliens&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;/aliens&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">If we change the external element but not the internal ones:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;,
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"animals"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"xml"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>aliens<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
  xml:
    name: aliens
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;aliens&gt;
  &lt;aliens&gt;value&lt;/aliens&gt;
  &lt;aliens&gt;value&lt;/aliens&gt;
&lt;/aliens&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security Scheme Object</h4><a id="user-content-security-scheme-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security Scheme Object" href="#security-scheme-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Defines a security scheme that can be used by the operations.
Supported schemes are HTTP authentication, an API key (either as a header or as a query parameter), OAuth2's common flows (implicit, password, application and access code) as defined in <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6749" rel="nofollow">RFC6749</a>, and <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-oauth-discovery-06" rel="nofollow">OpenID Connect Discovery</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-23" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-23"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Applies To</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemetype"></a>type</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Any</td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The type of the security scheme. Valid values are <code>"apiKey"</code>, <code>"http"</code>, <code>"oauth2"</code>, <code>"openIdConnect"</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemedescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Any</td>
<td>A short description for security scheme. <a href="http://spec.commonmark.org/" rel="nofollow">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemename"></a>name</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>apiKey</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The name of the header, query or cookie parameter to be used.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemein"></a>in</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>apiKey</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The location of the API key. Valid values are <code>"query"</code>, <code>"header"</code> or <code>"cookie"</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemescheme"></a>scheme</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>http</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The name of the HTTP Authorization scheme to be used in the <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7235#section-5.1" rel="nofollow">Authorization header as defined in RFC7235</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemebearerformat"></a>bearerFormat</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>http</code> (<code>"bearer"</code>)</td>
<td>A hint to the client to identify how the bearer token is formatted.  Bearer tokens are usually generated by an authorization server, so this information is primarily for documentation purposes.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemeflows"></a>flows</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#oauth-flows-object">OAuth Flows Object</a></td>
<td><code>oauth2</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. An object containing configuration information for the flow types supported.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityschemeopenidconnecturl"></a>openIdConnectUrl</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>openIdConnect</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. OpenId Connect URL to discover OAuth2 configuration values. This MUST be in the form of a URL.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security Scheme Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-security-scheme-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security Scheme Object Example" href="#security-scheme-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Basic Authentication Sample</h6><a id="user-content-basic-authentication-sample" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Basic Authentication Sample" href="#basic-authentication-sample"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;http&quot;,
  &quot;scheme&quot;: &quot;basic&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"scheme"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>basic<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: http
scheme: basic"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">http</span>
<span class="pl-ent">scheme</span>: <span class="pl-s">basic</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">API Key Sample</h6><a id="user-content-api-key-sample" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API Key Sample" href="#api-key-sample"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;apiKey&quot;,
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;api_key&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;header&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>apiKey<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,

}</pre></div>
