<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">JWT Bearer Sample</h6><a id="user-content-jwt-bearer-sample" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: JWT Bearer Sample" href="#jwt-bearer-sample"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;http&quot;,
  &quot;scheme&quot;: &quot;bearer&quot;,
  &quot;bearerFormat&quot;: &quot;JWT&quot;,
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"scheme"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>bearer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"bearerFormat"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>JWT<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: http
scheme: bearer
bearerFormat: JWT"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">http</span>
<span class="pl-ent">scheme</span>: <span class="pl-s">bearer</span>
<span class="pl-ent">bearerFormat</span>: <span class="pl-s">JWT</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Implicit OAuth2 Sample</h6><a id="user-content-implicit-oauth2-sample" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Implicit OAuth2 Sample" href="#implicit-oauth2-sample"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;oauth2&quot;,
  &quot;flows&quot;: {
    &quot;implicit&quot;: {
      &quot;authorizationUrl&quot;: &quot;https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog&quot;,
      &quot;scopes&quot;: {
        &quot;write:pets&quot;: &quot;modify pets in your account&quot;,
        &quot;read:pets&quot;: &quot;read your pets&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>oauth2<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"flows"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"implicit"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"authorizationUrl"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"scopes"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"write:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>modify pets in your account<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"read:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>read your pets<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: oauth2
flows:
  implicit:
    authorizationUrl: https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog
    scopes:
      write:pets: modify pets in your account
      read:pets: read your pets"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">oauth2</span>
<span class="pl-ent">flows</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">implicit</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">authorizationUrl</span>: <span class="pl-s">https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">scopes</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">write:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">modify pets in your account</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">read:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">read your pets</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OAuth Flows Object</h4><a id="user-content-oauth-flows-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OAuth Flows Object" href="#oauth-flows-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-24" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-24"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowsimplicit"></a>implicit</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#oauth-flow-object">OAuth Flow Object</a></td>
<td>Configuration for the OAuth Implicit flow</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowspassword"></a>password</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#oauth-flow-object">OAuth Flow Object</a></td>
<td>Configuration for the OAuth Resource Owner Password flow</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowsclientcredentials"></a>clientCredentials</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#oauth-flow-object">OAuth Flow Object</a></td>
<td>Configuration for the OAuth Client Credentials flow.  Previously called <code>application</code> in OpenAPI 2.0.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowsauthorizationcode"></a>authorizationCode</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#oauth-flow-object">OAuth Flow Object</a></td>
<td>Configuration for the OAuth Authorization Code flow.  Previously called <code>accessCode</code> in OpenAPI 2.0.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OAuth Flow Object</h4><a id="user-content-oauth-flow-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OAuth Flow Object" href="#oauth-flow-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Configuration details for a supported OAuth Flow</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-25" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-25"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Applies To</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowauthorizationurl"></a>authorizationUrl</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>oauth2</code> (<code>"implicit"</code>, <code>"authorizationCode"</code>)</td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The authorization URL to be used for this flow. This MUST be in the form of a URL.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowtokenurl"></a>tokenUrl</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>oauth2</code> (<code>"password"</code>, <code>"clientCredentials"</code>, <code>"authorizationCode"</code>)</td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The token URL to be used for this flow. This MUST be in the form of a URL.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowrefreshurl"></a>refreshUrl</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><code>oauth2</code></td>
<td>The URL to be used for obtaining refresh tokens. This MUST be in the form of a URL.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-oauthflowscopes"></a>scopes</td>
<td align="center">Map[<code>string</code>, <code>string</code>]</td>
<td><code>oauth2</code></td>
<td><strong>REQUIRED</strong>. The available scopes for the OAuth2 security scheme. A map between the scope name and a short description for it.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specification-extensions">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OAuth Flow Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-oauth-flow-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OAuth Flow Object Examples" href="#oauth-flow-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;oauth2&quot;,
  &quot;flows&quot;: {
    &quot;implicit&quot;: {
      &quot;authorizationUrl&quot;: &quot;https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog&quot;,
      &quot;scopes&quot;: {
        &quot;write:pets&quot;: &quot;modify pets in your account&quot;,
        &quot;read:pets&quot;: &quot;read your pets&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;authorizationCode&quot;: {
      &quot;authorizationUrl&quot;: &quot;https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog&quot;,
      &quot;tokenUrl&quot;: &quot;https://example.com/api/oauth/token&quot;,
      &quot;scopes&quot;: {
        &quot;write:pets&quot;: &quot;modify pets in your account&quot;,
        &quot;read:pets&quot;: &quot;read your pets&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>oauth2<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"flows"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"implicit"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"authorizationUrl"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"scopes"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"write:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>modify pets in your account<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"read:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>read your pets<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"authorizationCode"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"authorizationUrl"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"tokenUrl"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://example.com/api/oauth/token<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"scopes"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"write:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>modify pets in your account<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"read:pets"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>read your pets<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: oauth2
flows:
  implicit:
    authorizationUrl: https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog
    scopes:
      write:pets: modify pets in your account
      read:pets: read your pets
  authorizationCode:
    authorizationUrl: https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog
    tokenUrl: https://example.com/api/oauth/token
    scopes:
      write:pets: modify pets in your account
      read:pets: read your pets"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">oauth2</span>
<span class="pl-ent">flows</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">implicit</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">authorizationUrl</span>: <span class="pl-s">https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">scopes</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">write:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">modify pets in your account</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">read:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">read your pets</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">authorizationCode</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">authorizationUrl</span>: <span class="pl-s">https://example.com/api/oauth/dialog</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">tokenUrl</span>: <span class="pl-s">https://example.com/api/oauth/token</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">scopes</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">write:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">modify pets in your account</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">read:pets</span>: <span class="pl-s">read your pets</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security Requirement Object</h4><a id="user-content-security-requirement-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security Requirement Object" href="#security-requirement-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Lists the required security schemes to execute this operation.
The name used for each property MUST correspond to a security scheme declared in the <a href="#componentsSecuritySchemes">Security Schemes</a> under the <a href="#components-object">Components Object</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto">Security Requirement Objects that contain multiple schemes require that all schemes MUST be satisfied for a request to be authorized.
This enables support for scenarios where multiple query parameters or HTTP headers are required to convey security information.</p>
<p dir="auto">When a list of Security Requirement Objects is defined on the <a href="#openapi-object">Open API object</a> or <a href="#operation-object">Operation Object</a>, only one of Security Requirement Objects in the list needs to be satisfied to authorize the request.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-3" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-3"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-securityrequirementsname"></a>{name}</td>
<td align="center">[<code>string</code>]</td>
<td>Each name MUST correspond to a security scheme which is declared in the <a href="#componentsSecuritySchemes">Security Schemes</a> under the <a href="#components-object">Components Object</a>. If the security scheme is of type <code>"oauth2"</code> or <code>"openIdConnect"</code>, then the value is a list of scope names required for the execution. For other security scheme types, the array MUST be empty.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security Requirement Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-security-requirement-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security Requirement Object Examples" href="#security-requirement-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Non-OAuth2 Security Requirement</h6><a id="user-content-non-oauth2-security-requirement" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Non-OAuth2 Security Requirement" href="#non-oauth2-security-requirement"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;api_key&quot;: []
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"api_key"</span>: []
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="api_key: []"><pre><span class="pl-ent">api_key</span>: <span class="pl-s">[]</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OAuth2 Security Requirement</h6><a id="user-content-oauth2-security-requirement" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OAuth2 Security Requirement" href="#oauth2-security-requirement"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;petstore_auth&quot;: [
    &quot;write:pets&quot;,
    &quot;read:pets&quot;
  ]
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"petstore_auth"</span>: [
    <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>write:pets<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>read:pets<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
  ]
}</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="petstore_auth:
- write:pets
- read:pets"><pre><span class="pl-ent">petstore_auth</span>:
- <span class="pl-s">write:pets</span>
- <span class="pl-s">read:pets</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Specification Extensions</h3><a id="user-content-specification-extensions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Specification Extensions" href="#specification-extensions"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">While the OpenAPI Specification tries to accommodate most use cases, additional data can be added to extend the specification at certain points.</p>
<p dir="auto">The extensions properties are implemented as patterned fields that are always prefixed by <code>"x-"</code>.</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-infoextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the OpenAPI Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. Can have any valid JSON format value.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">The extensions may or may not be supported by the available tooling, but those may be extended as well to add requested support (if tools are internal or open-sourced).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security Filtering</h3><a id="user-content-security-filtering" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security Filtering" href="#security-filtering"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Some objects in the OpenAPI Specification MAY be declared and remain empty, or be completely removed, even though they are inherently the core of the API documentation.</p>
<p dir="auto">The reasoning is to allow an additional layer of access control over the documentation.
While not part of the specification itself, certain libraries MAY choose to allow access to parts of the documentation based on some form of authentication/authorization.</p>
<p dir="auto">Two examples of this:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>The <a href="#paths-object">Paths Object</a> MAY be empty. It may be counterintuitive, but this may tell the viewer that they got to the right place, but can't access any documentation. They'd still have access to the <a href="#info-object">Info Object</a> which may contain additional information regarding authentication.</li>
<li>The <a href="#path-item-object">Path Item Object</a> MAY be empty. In this case, the viewer will be aware that the path exists, but will not be able to see any of its operations or parameters. This is different than hiding the path itself from the <a href="#paths-object">Paths Object</a>, so the user will not be aware of its existence. This allows the documentation provider to finely control what the viewer can see.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Appendix A: Revision History</h2><a id="user-content-appendix-a-revision-history" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Appendix A: Revision History" href="#appendix-a-revision-history"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

    ></ghcc-consent>


  <div id="ajax-error-message" class="ajax-error-message flash flash-error" hidden>
    <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-alert">
    <path d="M6.457 1.047c.659-1.234 2.427-1.234 3.086 0l6.082 11.378A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.082 15H1.918a1.75 1.75 0 0 1-1.543-2.575Zm1.763.707a.25.25 0 0 0-.44 0L1.698 13.132a.25.25 0 0 0 .22.368h12.164a.25.25 0 0 0 .22-.368Zm.53 3.996v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM9 11a1 1 0 1 1-2 0 1 1 0 0 1 2 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    <button type="button" class="flash-close js-ajax-error-dismiss" aria-label="Dismiss error">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
    </button>
    You can’t perform that action at this time.
  </div>

    <template id="site-details-dialog">
  <details class="details-reset details-overlay details-overlay-dark lh-default color-fg-default hx_rsm" open>
    <summary role="button" aria-label="Close dialog"></summary>
    <details-dialog class="Box Box--overlay d-flex flex-column anim-fade-in fast hx_rsm-dialog hx_rsm-modal">
      <button class="Box-btn-octicon m-0 btn-octicon position-absolute right-0 top-0" type="button" aria-label="Close dialog" data-close-dialog>
        <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
      </button>
      <div class="octocat-spinner tmp-my-6 js-details-dialog-spinner"></div>
    </details-dialog>
  </details>
</template>

    <div class="Popover js-hovercard-content position-absolute" style="display: none; outline: none;">
  <div class="Popover-message Popover-message--bottom-left Popover-message--large Box color-shadow-large" style="width:360px;">
  </div>
</div>

    <template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon m-2 tmp-m-2">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none m-2 tmp-m-2">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>
<template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button-unpositioned">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>


    </div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true" ></div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice-assertive" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true"></div>
  </body>
</html>
